title: Feature Root: TUI dashboard mode cross-process scheduler event log
description: Shared execution root for converting the TUI into an event-log-driven dashboard, enriching scheduler event payloads, and removing TUI-owned scheduling behavior.
acceptance_criteria: All implementation, testing, documentation, and review work for this spec is represented by child beads under this feature root.
The resulting feature tree contains exactly one shared tester bead, one shared documentation bead, and one shared review bead.
Developer work is split into focused beads with explicit dependencies and bounded file scope.
